title: lilium leucanthum var. chloraster
intro: Lilium leucanthum var. chloraster, also known as the golden-rayed lily, is a type of plant species within the lily family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of golden-rayed lily include reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and promoting skin health. Herbal preparations of Lilium leucanthum var. chloraster are typically made from its rhizome, which is dried and then used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
